negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_39e7ea12-edeb-41fd-87c7-ba1f16e90769
prompt: In this video, a man and a woman are hiking up a hill amidst a rugged mountain landscape. The woman stands out in a vibrant hot pink jacket with black zippers and the Norwegian flag embroidered on the right side and on her right sleeve. She pairs it with a matching pink beanie featuring the inscription “GETOUT” in pink against a white rectangular background. She is wearing black-framed glasses and a backpack with black straps. Beside her on the right is the man, dressed in a black jacket with orange zippers and the Norwegian flag embroidered on the right chest. He complements his outfit with a plain black beanie, a dark blue shirt beneath his jacket, and a gray saddle bag slung across his body from his left shoulder. Both hikers exude a cheerful demeanor, smiling expressively as they gesture animatedly toward the camera.  The woman waves energetically with her left hand before raising both hands in a playful thumbs-up gesture, shaking them back and forth. The man mirrors her enthusiasm, giving a thumbs-up with his left hand as he smiles warmly. They walk side by side along the rocky path, glancing alternately at the camera and the trail ahead. The setting is serene, with thick clouds hanging low over jagged peaks in the distance. Green and brown grasses cover the rolling hills, appearing slightly damp. Despite the cloudy skies, the ambient lighting is soft and even, illuminating the hikers and the landscape. The camera maintains a medium shot at eye level, tracking backward with slight bounces to capture the hikers’ steady pace up the narrow, rocky path.
